title: solidago virgaurea subsp. virgaurea
intro: Solidago virgaurea subsp. virgaurea, also known as the upright goldenrod, is a perennial plant species belonging to the aster family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiseptic properties, which have been employed to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Solidago virgaurea subsp. virgaurea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
